# KBBG - Korean Beauty Buyers Guide (Full Site Documentation)
> AI-powered Korean beauty and medical tourism guide supporting 8 languages.
> Website: https://kbeautybuyersguide.com

## About KBBG
KBBG (Korean Beauty Buyers Guide) is a comprehensive platform for international visitors seeking beauty clinics, cosmetic procedures, and skincare products in South Korea. The site provides AI-powered clinic recommendations, face analysis tools, real-time cosmetics rankings, multilingual community forums, and detailed procedure guides.

## Supported Languages
English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Vietnamese, Thai, Russian, Mongolian

---

## Page Descriptions

### Homepage (/en/)
The main landing page with:
- AI-powered natural language clinic search (ask in plain English about procedures)
- AI Face Analysis tool (upload a selfie for personalized K-beauty recommendations)
- Clinic finder with filters by specialty and region
- Expert consultation request form
- Top medical departments overview
- Community preview with latest forum posts
- Live Korea street cameras

### AI Clinic Recommendation (/en/recommend)
Interactive quiz-style recommendation engine. Users answer questions about:
- Desired procedure type (plastic surgery, dermatology, dental, ophthalmology)
- Budget range
- Preferred location in Korea
- Specific concerns and priorities
The AI generates personalized clinic recommendations based on responses.

### Clinic Search (/en/hospitals)
Database of Korean medical clinics searchable by:
- Medical specialty (plastic surgery, dermatology, dental, ophthalmology, etc.)
- Region (Seoul, Gangnam, Incheon, Busan, etc.)
- Clinic type
- Keyword search

### Community Forum (/en/community)
Multilingual discussion board with categories:
- Medical: Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Internal Medicine, Dental, Ophthalmology, Gynecology, Orthopedics, Korean Medicine, Urology, ENT
- Culture: K-Pop, K-Food, K-Drama, K-Fashion, Travel, Korean Language Learning

### K-Beauty Cosmetics Rankings (/en/cosmetics)
Weekly updated top 20 product rankings from major Korean beauty platforms:
- Naver Shopping (real-time API)
- Olive Young
- Glowpick
- Hwahae
Categories: Skincare, Makeup, Suncare, Cleansing

### Medical Procedure Guides (/en/guides)
Authoritative guides to 38 medical procedures across 10 specialties:

#### Plastic Surgery
- Double Eyelid Surgery ($800-$1,500, 14 days recovery)
- Rhinoplasty / Nose Job ($2,000-$5,000, 14 days recovery)
- V-Line Jaw Contouring ($5,000-$12,000, 90 days recovery)
- Breast Augmentation ($3,000-$6,000, 30 days recovery)
- Facelift ($4,000-$8,000, 21 days recovery)
- Cheekbone Reduction ($4,000-$8,000, 60 days recovery)
- Fat Grafting ($1,500-$3,500, 14 days recovery)
- Liposuction ($2,000-$5,000, 14 days recovery)

#### Dermatology
- Ultherapy / HIFU ($800-$1,500, 0 days recovery)
- Thermage FLX ($700-$1,200, 0 days recovery)
- Pico Laser Toning ($150-$300/session, 1 day recovery)
- Skin Booster Injection ($300-$600, 1 day recovery)
- Thread Lift ($800-$2,000, 3 days recovery)

#### Dental
- Dental Implant ($900-$1,800, 7 days recovery)
- Porcelain Veneer ($280-$450/tooth, 3 days recovery)
- Invisalign ($2,500-$4,000, 0 days recovery)
- Teeth Whitening ($120-$250, 0 days recovery)

#### Ophthalmology
- LASIK ($1,500-$2,200 both eyes, 3 days recovery)
- LASEK ($1,200-$1,800 both eyes, 5 days recovery)
- ICL Implantable Lens ($3,000-$4,500, 3 days recovery)

#### Other Specialties
- Internal Medicine: Health checkup packages, IV therapy
- OBGYN: Gynecological examinations
- Orthopedics: Joint treatments, stem cell therapy
- Korean Medicine: Acupuncture, herbal treatments
- Urology: Men's health treatments
- ENT: Rhinitis treatment, sleep apnea

### FAQ (/en/faq)
30 detailed Q&A entries covering 6 categories:

#### General
- Why travel to South Korea for medical procedures
- Safety for medical tourists
- How far in advance to book
- Most popular procedure types
- Finding reputable clinics

#### Visa
- Visa requirements for medical tourism
- C-3-M Medical Tourism Visa
- Extending stay for recovery
- Companion visas

#### Cost
- Price comparisons (Korea vs US/UK/Australia)
- What procedure costs include
- Dental trip budgeting
- Payment methods at Korean clinics
- Insurance coverage

#### Procedure
- Double eyelid surgery details
- Korean rhinoplasty approach
- V-line jaw surgery and recovery
- Popular non-surgical skin treatments
- LASIK process and timeline
- What to bring to consultations

#### Recovery
- Minimum stay duration by procedure
- Flying safety after surgery
- Best recovery accommodations in Seoul
- Post-surgery diet in Korea
- Managing swelling and bruising

#### Language
- English support at Korean clinics
- Languages supported beyond English
- Best translation apps (Papago, etc.)
- Post-op care communication
- Medical interpreter availability

---

## Key Regions Covered
- Seoul: Gangnam, Apgujeong, Sinsa-dong, Myeongdong, Hongdae
- Incheon: Airport area clinics
- Busan: Seomyeon medical district
- Jeju: Medical tourism packages

## Medical Specialties
Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Dental, Ophthalmology, Internal Medicine, OBGYN, Orthopedics, Korean Medicine (Traditional), Urology, ENT

## How to Use KBBG
1. Search for clinics using AI natural language search or filters
2. Upload a selfie for AI face analysis and personalized recommendations
3. Browse procedure guides for detailed information on costs and recovery
4. Read community forum posts for real patient experiences
5. Request expert consultation for personalized clinic matching
6. Check cosmetics rankings for trending K-beauty products

## Contact
Website: https://kbeautybuyersguide.com
